channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: See the Next ‘Hunger Games’ in This Trip Down Memory Lane
item.description: The 'Hunger Games' series has come pretty far, and it's got at least one more movie in it with 'Sunrise on the Reaping.

item.title: On a vu la 1ère Volkswagen électrique à 25 000 €, la BYD qui se charge en 5 minutes arrive en France et la plus grande usine de vélo de France – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: De la nouvelle Volkswagen électrique à moins de 25 000 € au rapport choc de la Cour des comptes en passant la BYD qui arrive en France avec la recharge en 5 minutes, l’actualité Survoltés a été dense cette semaine. Voici ce qu'il ne fallait pas manquer sur le 100 % électrique.

item.title: Rockstar Games has confirmed it was hit by third-party data breach
item.description: An experienced hacking group has claimed to have infiltrated Rockstar Games' cloud servers, while the game publisher has confirmed that there was a "third-party data breach." ShinyHunters, a hacker group that's been linked to data breaches targeting Microsoft, Google, Ticketmaster and others, posted a message on its website with a final warning to Rockstar to "pay or leak." The hack was first spotted by Hackread and the Cybersec Guru. ShinyHunters didn't detail what Rockstar data it gained access to, only adding that the company had until April 14 to reach out or that the group would leak the ...

item.title: '$15K bill destroyed a solo developer’s startup': How hackers are using leaked Google API keys to ‘go wild’ with Gemini AI for free
item.description: Developers’ public API keys now function as live Gemini AI credentials, enabling attackers to run costly and unauthorized operations.

item.title: E.Leclerc casse déjà le prix du nouveau smartphone pas cher de Realme avec une autonomie XXL
item.description: Le Realme Note 70T possède un design raffiné grâce à un dos uni et doré qu'E.Leclerc vous propose de découvrir pour 119,90 euros au lieu de 149,90 euros.

item.title: Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home
item.description: The OpenAI CEO's new blog post responds to both an apparent attack on his home and an in-depth New Yorker profile raising questions about his trustworthiness.

item.title: The first European country to get Tesla’s Full Self-Driving Supervised will be the Netherlands
item.description: Tesla's Full Self-Driving (Supervised) is ready to make its European debut, and it's starting with the Netherlands. According to Tesla Europe, the automaker's driver assistance system was approved in the Netherlands and will start rolling out shortly. RDW, the country's regulatory authority on vehicles, confirmed the news with a post on its website about Tesla receiving a type approval for its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) system. According to the RDW, Tesla's Full Self-Driving (Supervised) "has been extensively examined and tested for more than one and a half years on our test track and on p...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs vélos pliants électriques en 2026 ?
item.description: De 16 ou 20 pouces, moteur avant ou arrière, systèmes de pliages divers et variés, nous avons testé pour vous les vélos électriques pliants les plus réputés du marché. Suivez le guide pour trouver le meilleur vélo électrique pliable !
